text:
Large Language Model (LLM) is a deep learning NLP model.
Transformer core components: Self-Attention, Multi-Head Attention,
Feed Forward Network, and Positional Encoding.
Training usually includes pretraining and fine-tuning stages.
Attention helps capture long-range dependencies in sequences.
大语言模型

apture long-range dependencies in sequences.
大语言模型是一种基于深度学习的自然语言处理模型。
Transformer架构核心组件包括自注意力、多头注意力、前馈网络和位置编码。
